description.sourceText: When activated, enters the Shell Spin state. Follows the player while spinning, increasing ore mining efficiency by 800%.
Can be ridden. While in party, increase Defense of Dragon Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, increases Defense of Electric Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.
When activated, teleports to the nearest base. Cannot be used inside dungeons or similar areas.
Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.
Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.
While in party, increases Attack of Ground Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases amount of Gold Coin dropped by enemies by +100%. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin. (Does not stack)

While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player (Fire / Power: 100 / Burn buildup: 777). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by 110%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by 20%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by 2% for each other Dragonor Dark Pal in your party.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by 2% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis)
Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by 220%.
Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Lumbering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 (Does not stack)
When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by 30%.
While in party, grants the player the ability to Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.
This Pal's Attack increases by 12% for each Beegarde in party.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, Dark Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Fire damage and are immune to Burn. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Ice Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Fire Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat a life steal effect that restores 5% of damage dealt as Health.
Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.
Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While in party, Water Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by 30%.

While in party, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, reducing the weight of weapons in your inventory by 60%. Also improves player's and Pals' Fire damage to enemy weak points by 70%. (Does not stack)
While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.1% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to 40% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)
While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.
While in party, increases Attack of Ice Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.
When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.
When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice, inflict Freeze 1, increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Dark, inflict Blind 1, increases Attack by 1%.
While in party, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens focus, increasing the player's reload speeds by 20%. (Does not stack)
When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
While in party, improves player mining efficiency by 30% and reduces Stone weight by 34%. (Does not stack)
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.
Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Dark or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler)
Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Fire or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler Ignis)
Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ground and increases Attack by 1%.
While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0.
While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Aqua Gun. When this Pal uses Aqua Gun, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by 10%.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by 10%.
When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack by 75% for a limited time.
While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by 50%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a 50% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.
While in party, improves logging efficiency by 30% and reduces weight of all types of wood by 35%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 1%.
While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore 30/36/42/48/60% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.
While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
When activated, Icelyn changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 30%.
When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier.
When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Nightmare Claw. When this Pal uses Nightmare Claw, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.
When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.
When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.
Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Soak by 50%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, nullifies lava damage and increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Burn by 50%. (Does not stack)
While in party, Neutral Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. Also has a 50% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)
While at a base, increases the Kindling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Attack of Water Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Aquatic Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases Attack of Fire Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases Defense of Ground Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.
Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.
Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.
Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Ice damage and are immune to Freeze. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Dark damage and are immune to Blind. (Does not stack)
When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's Attack by 50% and Defense by 75% for a limited time.
When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis's Attack by 60% and Defense by 85% for a limited time.
When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases the player's Defense by 50% while sprinting. (Does not stack)
While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by 10%. (Does not stack)
This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 2% for each other Grass Pal in your party.
When activated, Leezpunk and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for 10/12/14/16/20 seconds.
When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for 10/12/14/16/20 seconds.
When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.
While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to 15% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by 15%. (Does not stack)

When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. When this Pal uses Snow Claw, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by 15%. (Does not stack)
While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander a life steal effect that restores 5% of damage dealt as Health.
While at a base, Lullu fills farms with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops by 50%.
While in party, spheres home in on Pals, and carrying capacity increases by 300. (Does not stack)
When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by 80/82/84/86/90%.
When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by 85/87/89/91/95%.

While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy creates flames around itself, dealing continuous damage equal to 15% of the player's attack damage to enemies that come into contact with them. (Does not stack.)
Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by 220% and mining efficiency by 260%.
Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by 220% and mining efficiency by 260%.
Can be ridden. While in party, all Party Pals' Active Skill cooldowns are reduced by 30% whenever you defeat an enemy. (Does not stack)
Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.
Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, player's Defense increases by 50%, and Electric Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
While in party, player's Defense increases by 50%, and Electric Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
While fighting together, Mimog can open treasure chests without using a key.
Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by 4% for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.
Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Ice damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.
Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.
Sometimes drops Milk when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Freeze. (Does not stack)
While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by 30%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by 35%. (Does not stack)
While at a base, increases the Medicine Production Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. When Twin Spears skill is activated, a Paladius in your party will appear and attack alongside you.
While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Ivy-Covered by 50%. (Does not stack)
While in party, the player's attacks inflict Ivy-Covered 2. (Does not stack)
While in party, it follows up the player's attacks with Water spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.
While fighting together, Pals drop +100% more Pal Souls when defeated. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Defense of Grass Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.
When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time. While in party, increases the player's shotgun damage by 10%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak 2. (Does not stack)
While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by 1% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)
Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.
Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 155% while mounted on grass.
When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.
When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.
While in party, Fire Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by 75/77/79/82/85%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by 80/82/84/86/90%. While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)
While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Dragon damage. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 80% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes.
Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 80% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.
While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Poison by 50%. (Does not stack)
When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 30%.
While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest by 18%.
While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 10%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type toDark and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases Attack of Dragon Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Grass and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound)
Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of Ice Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Heat Resistance +2. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.
Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.
